calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Court Trial and Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff: Sun Property Management.
Plaintiff's Witness: Elizabeth Miller was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant Aurora Davis and
Exhibit 1---Three day notice -------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Lease agreement -------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant Aurora Davis and Defaulted Defendants: Robert Davis and Robert Davis, Jr. as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1511 Gough St. #203, San Francisco
Past-due Rent and Holdover damages $1,019.20
Costs per memo of cost, for a total of $,1019.20
Lease is forfeited.
Judgment signed and Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for Plaintiff Sun Property Management and with property manager Elizabeth Miller.
LTD. Scope Attorney Richard McPalmer, Esq. for and with Co-Defendant Aurora Davis only.
Settlement Conference held; case did NOT settle,
TRIAL DATE REMAINS.
JPT: Stan Bair; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
